speaker: speaker1
text: Can you tell me the best way to look for an apartment ?

speaker: speaker2
text: The local newspaper has ads for housing .

speaker: speaker1
text: Is there any way to find a roommate to share an apartment with ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sometimes you can post an advertisement saying that you need a roommate .

speaker: speaker1
text: What do landlords charge for rent ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Would you like an apartment for just yourself , or do you need it for two people ?

speaker: speaker1
text: There are two of us , but we only need a one-bedroom apartment .

speaker: speaker2
text: You should be able to easily find that for twelve hundred dollars a month .

speaker: speaker1
text: I really would appreciate it if you could come look at apartments with me .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure , I ’ ll go look at apartments with you anytime you want .
